nodes.label: AI Adaptive Assistant for Neurodivergent Learners
nodes.norm_label: ai adaptive assistant for neurodivergent learners

nodes.label: RAG-based Chatbot Implementation
nodes.rationale: Uses ConversationChain with ConversationBufferMemory to maintain context. RAG approach intended to retrieve relevant document chunks for context-aware responses, though full RAG is not yet implemented.

nodes.label: COPPA Compliance Gap
nodes.rationale: Product processes data from children under 13 but lacks verifiable parental consent flow and data-minimization/retention policy. Must be closed before any pilot with real children's data.

nodes.label: Dual Implementation Architecture Problem
nodes.rationale: A clean layered design (routers/services/schemas) was scaffolded but commented out. The live app is a monolithic reimplementation in app.py that diverges from it. Frontend mirrors this with dead routes/ directory duplicating pages/. Decision: pick one layer and delete the other.

nodes.label: Advanced RAG Pipeline Roadmap
nodes.rationale: Three-phase plan: (1) parent-child chunking for retrieval precision vs answer coherence tradeoff, (2) metadata filtering for per-child personalization, (3) cross-encoder re-ranking before generation. Moves from whole-document prompting to scalable retrieval.

nodes.label: Safety and Guardrail Layer Design
nodes.rationale: Input rail checks topic restriction, jailbreak detection, PII detection before LLM. Output rail checks toxicity, age-appropriateness, fact-grounding against RAG context. Uses NeMo Guardrails + Llama Guard as defense-in-depth for child safety.

nodes.label: Multimodal and Adaptive Tech Roadmap
nodes.rationale: Three components: (1) STT input via Web Speech API with Whisper fallback for dyslexic/pre-literate children, (2) real-time sentiment analysis using DistilBERT or Gemini structured output to detect frustration, (3) behavioral adaptation loop connecting eye-tracking focus signal to automatic content adjustments.

nodes.label: Accessibility and UX for Neurodivergent Children
nodes.rationale: Unconditional animations during stress moments counter-productive for vestibular sensitivity. No prefers-reduced-motion support, no aria-live regions, no screen-reader state change support. Sensory customization features (DyslexiaMode, AutismMode, Settings) exist only as stub routes.
nodes.norm_label: accessibility and ux for neurodivergent children
